message:
feat(session_restore): Cx-first restore_with_cx + detect_and_restore_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add two Cx-first siblings on `SessionRestorer`:

1. `restore_with_cx(cx, session, checkpoint, wezterm)` — pre-flight
   checkpoint gates the multi-step restore pipeline (topology parse
   → layout restore → scrollback inject → banner send → bookkeeping
   → process relaunch). Pure delegate to legacy `restore`.

2. `detect_and_restore_with_cx(cx, wezterm)` — checkpoint seams at
   each step boundary: (a) pre-flight, (b) before checkpoint load,
   (c) before WezTerm reachability check, (d) before inner restore
   (routed through `restore_with_cx` so cancellation propagates
   into the expensive multi-step pipeline).

Both legacy methods preserved unchanged.

Regression test `session_restorer_restore_with_cx_matches_legacy`
pins parity on a single-pane clean restore using MockWezterm:
restored_count == 1, failed_count == 0, checkpoint_id matches,
pane_id_map.len() == 1.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target): 82/82 session_restore tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
